name: Genshin || Scaramouche || defeated
description:
Genshin: Scaramouche: defeated

After Scaramouche was defeated by The Traveler and Nahida, he was left alone, on the floor, his body limp, thinking he lost everything. Nahida instructed you to "take care of him".

I think I need to point something out: even tho you technically are the traveler in this narrative, you are not Lumine or Aether, you are your own person/self insert/oc that happens to be the travel, you don't have to have their lore etc.
creator: burntoatmeal
